overall.description: Spider-Man walking through a nighttime urban environment resembling New York City, passing pedestrians and crossing streets. High-quality game engine footage with cinematic lighting, featuring autumn foliage and warm street lamp illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with storefronts and parked taxi

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily along the sidewalk past the Clinton Station storefront, glancing at pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in dark suit walking past Spider-Man in opposite direction

entered.detail: Green painted storefront with Clinton Station signage and large windows
Classic yellow taxi cab parked along the street curb
Multi-story red brick building with fire escapes visible
Dark high-rise building with grid of illuminated windows
Tall cast-iron street lamp casting warm orange light

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a city sidewalk at night, passing by the green Clinton Station storefront and a parked yellow taxi. The street is moderately busy with pedestrians walking in opposing directions, and warm street lamps illuminate the red brick buildings.

events.description: Spider-Man steps off the sidewalk and enters the crosswalk to cross the street

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crossing the street at the marked crosswalk, moving from one sidewalk to the opposite side

entered.detail: Wide pedestrian crossing with white painted stripes on dark asphalt
Traffic signal pole with illuminated red light

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man enters a wide intersection crosswalk, leaving the storefronts behind. The ground changes to striped asphalt as he crosses under the glow of traffic lights, with the tall office buildings visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with mural art and closed storefronts

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking along the sidewalk past a large peacock mural painted on the building wall

entered.detail: Large colorful mural of a peacock with elaborate feathers on brown building wall
Classic brownstone building facade with tall windows
Metal roll-down security shutter covering a storefront

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, Spider-Man walks along a quieter sidewalk section featuring a distinctive peacock mural on the wall. The area has fewer pedestrians and features closed storefronts with metal shutters and classic brownstone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with cafes and autumn trees

events.description: Spider-Man approaches the intersection and slows slightly before entering the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man continuing down the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and approaching the next intersection with traffic lights

notable_agents.action: woman carrying a shopping bag walking past Spider-Man

entered.detail: Illuminated cafe sign with red neon lettering
Street trees with orange and yellow autumn foliage
Tall light-colored stone building with vertical windows
Vertical pink neon hotel sign on building facade

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a busier commercial sidewalk lined with autumn trees and illuminated cafe signs. The white stone building rises in the distance with a pink neon sign, while pedestrians carrying shopping bags walk past. He approaches the next intersection to cross.

events.description: Spider-Man enters the crosswalk to cross the street toward the opposite corner

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crossing the street at the intersection, moving toward the opposite sidewalk where pedestrians are waiting

entered.detail: White painted zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt road
Green street name sign mounted on traffic light pole

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man enters the final crosswalk of the clip, crossing the street with white striped markings under his feet. The white stone building now appears on the left as he moves toward the opposite corner, passing under street signs and traffic lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nighttime city environment that shifts from a bustling storefront district to a quieter residential stretch before ending in a vibrant commercial area. It begins with Spider-Man walking past the green Clinton Station storefront and a parked yellow taxi under the warm glow of street lamps. As he leaves the storefronts behind, the camera follows him across a wide, striped asphalt intersection toward a quieter sidewalk featuring a peacock mural and closed brownstone buildings. The scene then expands into a busier commercial zone lined with autumn trees and illuminated cafe signs, moving past pedestrians with shopping bags toward a white stone building with a pink neon sign. Finally, the camera tracks him as he enters a second crosswalk, passing under traffic lights and street signs to reach the opposite corner.
